title: galium californicum subsp. flaccidum
intro: Galium californicum subsp. flaccidum, commonly known as California bedstraw or flaccid bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium californicum plant, which is a perennial herb that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium californicum subsp. flaccidum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
